author: Maxime Janton
subject: chore(doc): publishing v2 doc on /v2
body:
* chore(doc): always build into `/doc`
* chore(doc): deploy docs to gh-pages/v2
* chore: `npm run dev` also stars docs
* chore: remove `npm run docs:jsdoc`
* chore(gitignore): ignore `docs/` but not `scripts/docs/`
* chore(docs): provide NODE_ENV for local/dev build of docs
* chore: reset `yarn.lock` for merge
* chore: fix infinite loop on yarn dev
* chore(netlify): fix doc build
* chore: remove un-used script
